originalTitle: AMD’s new pitch: our old tech is so good you should just keep using it
summary: Computex 2026 is underway in Taiwan, and we're expecting all manner of flashy computers with jaw-dropping pricetags (or no pricetags at all) as the entire industry navigates RAMageddon. But for desktop PC gamers, AMD has a different pitch. It's relaunching three old components alongside a big new promise: you won't need to buy a new […]
content: Computex 2026 is underway in Taiwan, and we’re expecting all manner of flashy computers with jaw-dropping pricetags (or no pricetags at all) as the entire industry navigates RAMageddon. But for desktop PC gamers, AMD has a different pitch. It’s relaunching three old components alongside a big new promise: you won’t need to buy a new motherboard until 2030. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_124408.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] Today, AMD is promising it will keep supporting its AM5 desktop motherboard socket with new Ryzen processors through 2029, which likely means you can keep upgrading to newer CPUs till the end of the decade without changing your board. Even if you’re still on the older AM4 socket, you may have one last upgrade left: it’s relaunching a “10th Anniversary” edition of the Ryzen 7 5800X3D to celebrate the 10th anniversary of that AM4 platform. That’ll be $349 on June 25th. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_131105.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_131248.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] And if you decide now’s the time to switch to AMD or the AM5 socket, the company’s got a new old chip for that too: a $330 Ryzen 7 7700X3D, likely a binned version of the existing 7800X3D. The beefier chip costs $380 to $450, though can occasionally be found at $320. On paper, the 7700X3D looks only slightly slower: [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_132243.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] Again, this is old tech: the 7800X3D came out in 2023; its 9000-series successor came out in late 2024. But the old chip was plenty powerful, as you can see in my colleague Tom Warren’s comparison review with the 9950X3D, 9800X3D, and 7800X3D from 2025. (Check out how much less power the 7800X3D used in his chart, too.) Meanwhile in the GPU realm, AMD’s finally bringing its formerly China-exclusive Radeon RX 9070 GRE to other countries including the US, starting June 1st for $549. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_132629.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] That’s not quite as friendly for PC gamers to hear, as $549 was supposed to be the starting price for the notably more powerful RX 9070, not the cut-down GRE version which trails the RTX 5070. But the RX 9070 was never broadly available at $549, despite what AMD claimed to us at the time — it launched amidst a GPU shortage, hit $549 once, but the price settled closer to $599 or $620 once that shortage ended. So this would be a bit cheaper. AMD’s making an interesting pitch at a time that everything, especially gaming, is beginning to feel too expensive. Does it convince you?
chineseTitle: AMD 的新宣传：我们的旧技术非常好，您应该继续使用它
chineseSummary: Computex 2026 正在台湾举行，随着整个行业在 RAMgeddon 中航行，我们期待着各种带有令人瞠目结舌的价格标签（或根本没有价格标签）的华丽计算机。但对于台式电脑游戏玩家来说，AMD 有不同的主张。它重新推出了三个旧组件，同时还有一个重大的新承诺：您不需要购买新的[...]
chineseContent: Computex 2026 正在台湾举行，随着整个行业在 RAMgeddon 中航行，我们期待着各种带有令人瞠目结舌的价格标签（或根本没有价格标签）的华丽计算机。但对于台式电脑游戏玩家来说，AMD 有不同的主张。它重新推出了三个旧组件，同时还提出了一个重大新承诺：直到 2030 年，您都不需要购买新主板。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_124408.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 今天，AMD 承诺将继续以新的方式支持其 AM5 台式机主板插槽Ryzen 处理器将持续到 2029 年，这可能意味着您可以继续升级到更新的 CPU，直到本世纪末，而无需更换主板。即使您仍在使用较旧的 AM4 插槽，您可能还剩下最后一个升级：重新推出 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 的“10 周年”版本，以庆祝该 AM4 平台的 10 周年。 6 月 25 日的价格为 349 美元。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_131105.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] [图片： https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_131248.jpg?quality=90&strip=all]如果你决定现在是时候切换到AMD或AM5插槽了，该公司也有一个新的旧芯片：330美元的Ryzen 7 7700X3D，可能是一个垃圾箱现有7800X3D的版本。更强大的芯片售价为 380 至 450 美元，但有时售价为 320 美元。从纸面上看，7700X3D 看起来只是稍微慢一些：[图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot_20260531_132243.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 再说一遍，这是旧技术：7800X3D 于 2023 年推出；它的 9000 系列后继产品于 2024 年末推出。但旧芯片的功能非常强大，因为您
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
